Class LogEntry

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.model.LogEntry
public class LogEntry extends Object
Represents a Log Entry for activity tracking. Records state changes with timestamp, device, room, action, and actor information.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LogEntry(String timestamp, String device, String action, String actor)
    Creates a log entry when room information is unavailable.
    LogEntry(String timestamp, String device, String room, String action, String actor)
    Creates a log entry with explicit room information.

  • Constructor Details

    • LogEntry

      public LogEntry(String timestamp, String device, String room, String action, String actor)
      Creates a log entry with explicit room information.
      Parameters:
      timestamp - time of the logged action
      device - device affected by the action
      room - room containing the device
      action - action that occurred
      actor - actor that triggered the action

    • LogEntry

      public LogEntry(String timestamp, String device, String action, String actor)
      Creates a log entry when room information is unavailable.
      Parameters:
      timestamp - time of the logged action
      device - device affected by the action
      action - action that occurred
      actor - actor that triggered the action

      public String getTimestamp()
      Returns the log timestamp.
